nasb.text: Joseph saw the third generation of Ephraim’s sons; also the sons of Machir, the son of Manasseh, were born on Joseph’s knees.

esv.text: And Joseph saw Ephraim’s children of the third generation. The children also of Machir the son of Manasseh were counted as Joseph’s own.

cnv.text: 約瑟見到以法蓮的第三代子孫；瑪拿西的兒子瑪吉的眾子，也歸在約瑟的膝下。

ccb.text: 他看到了以法莲的孙子，也曾把玛拿西的儿子玛吉的孩子抱在膝上。

csbs.text: 约瑟看到了以法莲的第三代子孙。玛拿西的儿子玛吉的众子，生下来就归于约瑟膝下。
